Tests the Math.atan2 function with positive zero arguments.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test script that verifies the behavior of the `Math.atan2` function in JavaScript. It checks that when `Math.atan2` is called with both arguments as positive zero (`+0`), the result is also positive zero (`+0`). This test ensures that the `Math.atan2` function conforms to the expected mathematical behavior for this specific input case. The script uses a single assertion to validate this behavior, which is important for maintaining consistency in mathematical computations within JavaScript environments.
